name: dawnlike-atlas
description: Bin-packed mega-atlas and category atlases for the DawnLike tileset

scripts.build:mega: bun tools/build-mega-atlas.mjs --input source/Characters --input source/Items --input source/Objects --input source/GUI --output atlas --name Dawnlike
scripts.build:categories: bun tools/build-atlas.mjs --input source/Characters --output atlas --name Characters && bun tools/build-atlas.mjs --input source/Items --output atlas --name Items && bun tools/build-atlas.mjs --input source/Objects --output atlas --name Objects && bun tools/build-atlas.mjs --input source/GUI --output atlas --name GUI
